title: AB 595 will require 72-hour public notice before an adoptable pet can be euthanized
prompt_preview:

Return concise, standalone claim_texts that could be tested against scientific literature. Exclude purely procedural statem

raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "AB 595 will require 72-hour public notice before an adoptable pet can be euthanized.",
    "AB 595 will commission a statewide study to provide data on overcrowding at animal shelters.",
    "AB 595 aims to develop strategies to help stop unnecessary euthanasia of pets.",

    "AB 595 aims to make every shelter in California a no-kill shelter."
  ]
```
